channel.title: Calcora — Free Online Tools Hub
channel.description: 60+ free specialized online calculators for Finance, Health, Tech, and more.

item.title: EMI Calculator
item.description: Professional-grade EMI calculator with amortization schedule.

item.title: SIP Calculator
item.description: Wealth growth calculator with annual step-up projections.

item.title: Tech Stack Detector
item.description: Identify frameworks, CDNs, and APIs used by any website.
